features: ODOUR CLEAR TECHNOLOGY: Febreze 3volution plug in refill with Odourclear technology fights away tough lingering odours, providing a fresh environment
LONG-LASTING FRESHNESS: Leaves a light fresh scent for up to 90 days, if used 12 hours a day at minimum setting. This plug in air freshener refills 3volution offers consistent fragrance release
PLUG IN REFILL: This 3volution plug in refill is easy to use and replace, ensuring your space is always fresh
COTTON FRESH FRAGRANCE: The Febreze 3volution refill in Cotton Fresh fragrance is inspired by the freshness of pure white cotton, providing a comforting scent
EFFECTIVE CLEANING: Febreze plug in refill 3volution doesn't mask but truly fights tough lingering odours, leaving a light fresh scent
description: Product Description Febreze 3Volution Air Freshener Exotic Bloom continuously fights odours and alternates between 3 complementary scents for freshness you keep noticing. Lasts up to 90 days (if used 12h per day on low setting). Exotic Bloom fragrance is inspired by springtime natural freshness. Inspired by serene countryside, flowers and fruit-trees where blushes of peach blossom contrast with the floral brushstrokes of bewitching Rose de mai and Freesia. With traditional plugs, we get used to to scents quickly and stop noticing them. Febreze 3Volution renews the freshness by continously and automatically alternating between 3 complementary, high quality scents every 45 minutes. Use Febreze 3Volution refills with the 3Volution Electrical Diffuser to fill your home with freshness and fragrance that you will keep noticing day after day, week after week. 3Volution also lets you adjust the level of scent, helping you to create the ambiance that you want, when you want. Ingredients Linalool, Pentamethylheptenone, Hydroxycitronellal, Limonene, Citral, Alpha-Isomethyl Ionone, Geraniol, Linalyl Acetate, Tetrahydrolinalool, 2.4-Dimethyl-3-Cyclohexene Carboxaldehyde, Citronellol, Cyclamen Aldehyde, Ethyl 2, 2-Dimethylhydrocinnamal, Dimethyl Heptenal, Dihydro Pentamethylindanone, Nerol, Dimethylcyclohexenyl 3-Butenyl Ketone, Heliotropine, Citronellal, Allyl Cyclohexylpropionate, Delta-Damascone, 3-(P-Cumenyl)Propionaldehyde, Methylcyclopentadecenone, 7.7, 8.9.9-Pentamethyl-6, 6A, 7.8, 9.9A-Hexahydro-5H-Cyclopenta(H)Quinazoline, Isoeugenol, Methyl Isoeugenol, Lauraldehyde, (1-Methyl-2-(5-Methylhex-4-En-2-Yl)Cyclopropyl)Methanol, 4.7-Methano-1H-Indene-5-Acetaldehyde, Octahydro-, Eugenol, Methylundecanal, Methoxyhydratropaldehyde Safety Warning Causes skin irritation. Causes serious eye irritation. May cause an allergic skin reaction. Toxic to aquatic life with long lasting effects. Keep out of reach of children. If on skin: wash with plenty of water. If in eyes: rinse cautiously with water for several minutes. Call a poison centre/doctor if you feel unwell.
